figures.caption: Fig. 3. Experimental setup for water wading tests.

Fig. 4. Experimental setup; (a) shows the OptiTrack active pucks mounted onto the chassis frame, (b) shows the experiment run with 4 inches of water depth, (c) shows the experiment run with 10 inches of water depth
Fig. 6. Parity plots for net forces. Rows correspond to Fx, Fy , and Fz ; columns to Husky (left) and Warthog (right). The dashed line is the 1:1 reference.
Fig. 7. Mean predicted drag |Fpred x | versus v2 in the planar ground section at each depth. Dashed lines are per-depth origin-constrained fits (|Fx| = CD,eff v2). Each marker represents one trial.
Fig. 8. Predicted vertical force Fz versus v2 at each depth with per-depth linear fits (Fz = F0 + CL v2). Diamonds mark the speed-independent buoyancy intercepts F0.
